CheckEmailOutput.description: The result of the email verification process.

input.description: The email address that was verified.

misc.description: Additional information about the email account.

mx.description: Details obtained from querying the mail server's MX records.

smtp.description: Results from connecting to the mail server via SMTP.

CheckEmailOutput.title: CheckEmailOutput

CheckEmailRequest.description: A request object to perform an email verification. The `to_email` field is required, all other fields are optional.

check_gravatar.description: Whether to check if a Gravatar image exists for the given email.

from_email.description: In the SMTP connection, the FROM email address.

hello_name.description: In the SMTP connection, the EHLO hostname.

sandbox.description: When true, returns deterministic mock results without consuming credits or making real SMTP connections.

smtp_port.description: SMTP port to use for email validation. Defaults to 25, but 465, 587, and 2525 are sometimes also used.

CheckEmailRequest.title: CheckEmailRequest

CoreError.description: Details of an error encountered during the verification process.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.

CoreError.title: CoreError

end_time.description: The timestamp when the email verification ended.

server_name.description: The name of the server that performed the verification.

start_time.description: The timestamp when the email verification started.

DebugDetailsSmtp.description: SMTP details used for debugging, including the verification method.
DebugDetailsSmtp.title: DebugDetailsSmtp

Duration.description: An object representing a duration in seconds and nanoseconds.
Duration.title: Duration

catch_all_severity.description: Severity tier for catch-all domains (low=free provider, high=corporate)

domain_suggestion.description: Suggested corrected email when a likely domain typo is detected

normalized_email.description: Canonical form of the email after alias/plus-address normalization

strategy.description: Search strategy: parallel (all at once) or waterfall (high-quality patterns first)

GmailVerifMethod.description: Enumeration describing the method used to verify Gmail emails.
GmailVerifMethod.title: GmailVerifMethod

HotmailB2BVerifMethod.description: Enumeration describing the method used to verify Hotmail B2B emails.
HotmailB2BVerifMethod.title: HotmailB2BVerifMethod

HotmailB2CVerifMethod.description: Enumeration describing the method used to verify Hotmail B2C emails.
HotmailB2CVerifMethod.title: HotmailB2CVerifMethod

MiscDetails.description: Additional information about the email account.

gravatar_url.description: URL to the Gravatar profile picture associated with the email, if available and requested.

is_b2c.description: Is this a B2C email address?

is_disposable.description: Indicates if the email address is from a known disposable email provider.

is_role_account.description: Indicates if the email address is a role-based account.

MiscDetails.title: MiscDetails

MxDetails.description: Details about the mail server's MX records.

accepts_mail.description: Indicates if the mail server accepts emails.

records.description: List of Fully Qualified Domain Names (FQDN) of the mail server.

MxDetails.title: MxDetails

Reachable.description: An enumeration describing the confidence level that the recipient address is valid: `safe`, `risky`, `invalid`, or `unknown`. Refer to our FAQ for detailed definitions: https://help.reacher.email/email-attributes-inside-json.
Reachable.title: Reachable

SmtpDetails.description: Results from SMTP connection attempts to the mail server.

can_connect_smtp.description: Indicates if the mail exchanger can be contacted successfully.

has_full_inbox.description: Indicates if the mailbox is full.

is_catch_all.description: Indicates if the email address is a catch-all address.

is_deliverable.description: Indicates if an email sent to this address is deliverable.

is_disabled.description: Indicates if the email address has been disabled by the provider.

SmtpDetails.title: SmtpDetails

SyntaxDetails.description: Validation of the email address syntax.

domain.description: The domain part of the email address.

is_valid_syntax.description: Indicates if the email address syntax is valid.

username.description: The username part of the email address.

SyntaxDetails.title: SyntaxDetails

TaskWebhook.description: Optional webhook configuration for sending email verification results during bulk verification.
TaskWebhook.title: TaskWebhook

VerifMethod.description: The method used for email verification.

type.description: The method used for the email verification.

VerifMethod.title: VerifMethod

Webhook.description: Configuration for a webhook to receive email verification results. The method will be POST, and the body will contain the email verification response.

url.description: The URL to send the email verification results to.

Webhook.title: Webhook

YahooVerifMethod.description: Enumeration describing the method used to verify Yahoo emails.
YahooVerifMethod.title: YahooVerifMethod

Authorization.description: A Reacher API key is required for all requests. Sign up on https://reacher.email to get your personal API key.
Authorization.name: Authorization

info.description:
### What is Reacher?

Reacher is a robust, open-source email verification API service available as both a SaaS and self-hosted solution.
info.title: Reacher

get.description: Returns a lightweight readiness signal with no upstream dependency checks.

200.description: Merged OpenAPI specification for all documented REST endpoints

get.summary: Serve the merged OpenAPI document for all documented REST endpoints.

get.description: Performs dependency checks for Postgres and RabbitMQ and returns readiness status.

post.description: Creates a legacy bulk verification job and queues tasks synchronously via sqlxmq.

get.description: Returns current status and summary for a legacy bulk verification job.
Returns terminal result rows for a legacy bulk job.

post.description: Legacy email verification endpoint (deprecated, retained for compatibility).

get.description: List all API keys across tenants with optional filtering.
List jobs across all tenants with optional filters.
Fetch a single job.
Fetch events for a job.
Fetch task results for a job.
List tenants with optional status and pagination filters.
Fetch tenant details by tenant ID.
List API keys for a tenant.

post.description: Create a new API key for a tenant.

get.description: Fetch one API key by tenant and key ID.

patch.description: Update metadata for an API key.

post.description: Reactivate a previously revoked API key.

get.description: List jobs scoped to one tenant.
Fetch current tenant quota usage and remaining allowance.

post.description: Creates a tenant-scoped bulk job for async processing.

get.description: Returns status and current progress for a tenant-scoped v1 bulk job.
Returns terminal results for a tenant-scoped v1 bulk job.

post.description: Verifies an email address and returns a result.

get.description: Returns progress summary and state for a tenant-scoped bulk job.
Returns a pre-send approval checklist summarizing list quality.

post.description: Requests cancellation for a tenant-scoped bulk job.

get.description: Streams all terminal task results for a tenant-scoped bulk job.
Returns paginated event history for a tenant-scoped bulk job.
Returns paginated completed task results for a tenant-scoped bulk job.

post.description: Retries all failed or dead-lettered tasks in a tenant-scoped bulk job.

get.description: Returns the authenticated tenant context and quota metadata.
List API keys for the authenticated tenant.

post.description: Create a new API key for the authenticated tenant.

get.description: Return a single API key for the authenticated tenant.

patch.description: Update metadata for an existing API key.

get.description: List all active and inactive domain entries for the authenticated tenant.

post.description: Add a domain for the authenticated tenant.

delete.description: Remove a domain from the authenticated tenant.

get.description: Get one domain entry for the authenticated tenant.

patch.description: Update the domain value, status, verification state, or metadata notes.

get.description: Get tenant runtime settings and default operational behavior.

patch.description: Update tenant settings such as retention, default webhook URL, or secret.

get.description: Return current tenant usage and quota summary.

delete.description: Clear tenant webhook URL and signing secret.

get.description: Get masked tenant webhook integration state.

patch.description: Update tenant webhook URL and signing secret.

get.description: Returns the running server version.
